name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial offers secured and unsecured personal loans from $1,500–$30,000 with fixed rates between 11.99%–35.99% APR, funded as fast as 1 hour after closing.
description_long:
OneMain Financial is one of the oldest consumer lending institutions in the United States, with over 100 years of operating history. The company operates a nationwide network of physical branch locations, including this W Flagler St branch in Miami, FL (33144), providing in-person loan services alongside online and phone-based applications.

OneMain offers secured and unsecured personal loans ranging from $1,500 to $30,000, with repayment terms between 24 and 60 months. Fixed interest rates run from 11.99% to 35.99% APR. Loan use cases include debt consolidation, medical bills, emergency expenses, auto purchase and refinance, home improvement, moving, weddings, vacations, pool installation, motorcycles, RVs, boats, and funeral costs. Borrowers can apply online, by phone, or in-branch.

What distinguishes OneMain is its emphasis on branch-based, one-on-one loan specialist assistance — including after-hours appointments — combined with its SpeedFunds feature, which can deliver loan proceeds to an eligible bank-issued debit card in as little as one hour after closing. Loans carry no prepayment fees, and all rates and payments are fixed for the life of the loan, eliminating surprise payment changes.

OneMain is a legitimate option for borrowers with imperfect credit who need personal loan amounts up to $30,000 and value face-to-face guidance. However, its APR ceiling of 35.99% is high — borrowers who qualify for lower-rate alternatives should compare carefully. The secured loan option (requiring collateral) may help some applicants qualify or obtain better terms, but it introduces asset risk. This is not a low-cost lender; it serves the near-prime and subprime market where few alternatives exist.
pros: Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments on all loans — no variable rate surprises
SpeedFunds delivers money in as little as 1 hour after closing via eligible debit card
Both secured and unsecured loan options available ($1,500–$30,000)
No prepayment fees — pay off early without penalty
Over 100 years in operation — established, regulated consumer lender
After-hours branch appointments available for borrowers with scheduling constraints
Prequalification check does not affect your credit score
cons: APR ceiling of 35.99% is among the highest legally permissible — near payday loan territory for lowest-qualified borrowers
Maximum loan amount of $30,000 is lower than many online personal loan competitors
Secured loan option requires pledging collateral (vehicle), introducing asset forfeiture risk
Branch-centric model means the experience is less streamlined than fully digital lenders
Loan minimum of $1,500 may be more than needed for very small emergency expenses
best_for: Near-prime or subprime borrowers who cannot qualify for bank or credit union personal loans
Borrowers who prefer in-person guidance from a loan specialist over a purely digital process
Consumers needing $5,000–$20,000 for debt consolidation with predictable fixed payments
Borrowers who need fast funding and have an eligible debit card for SpeedFunds disbursement
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best suited for borrowers with less-than-perfect credit who need $1,500–$30,000 and want the security of a long-established lender with in-person support. The main caveat is cost: rates can reach 35.99% APR, so borrowers who qualify for credit union or online lenders at lower rates should exhaust those options first.
